allow: PowerShell($idx = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\nafar\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\CardSearch\\pokeref\\public\\data\\index.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Total entries: $\($idx.Count\)"; $idx | ForEach-Object { $_.setIdJa } | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { $set = $_; $count = \($idx | Where-Object { $_.setIdJa -eq $set }\).Count; "$set : $count" })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\nafar\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\CardSearch\\pokeref"; $data = Get-Content haa_en_api.json -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Total count: $\($data.totalCount\)"; Write-Host "Cards returned: $\($data.data.Count\)"; Write-Host "First card: $\($data.data[0].name\) - $\($data.data[0].number\)")

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\nafar\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\CardSearch\\pokeref"; $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.pokemontcg.io/v2/cards?q=set.id:dri&pageSize=10" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Count: $\($resp.totalCount\)"; $resp.data | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.number\) - $\($_.name\)" })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\nafar\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\CardSearch\\pokeref"; $haa = Get-Content "public\\data\\cards\\haa.json" -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; $haa | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.id\) | $\($_.nameJa\) | dex=$\($_.nationalPokedexNumber\) | supertype=$\($_.supertype\)" })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\nafar\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\CardSearch\\pokeref"; $haa = Get-Content "public\\data\\cards\\haa.json" -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; $withDex = \($haa | Where-Object { $_.nationalPokedexNumber -ne $null -and $_.nationalPokedexNumber -ne "" }\).Count; $total = $haa.Count; Write-Host "With dex: $withDex / $total"; $haa | Where-Object { \($_.nationalPokedexNumber -eq $null -or $_.nationalPokedexNumber -eq ""\) -and $_.supertype -eq "Pokémon" } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Missing dex: $\($_.id\) $\($_.nameJa\)" })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\nafar\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\CardSearch\\pokeref"; $api = Get-Content haa_en_api.json -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Total API cards: $\($api.Count\)"; $api | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "---"; Write-Host "name=$\($_.name\) number=$\($_.number\) dex=$\($_.nationalPokedexNumbers\)"; if \($_.attacks\) { $_.attacks | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  atk: $\($_.name\) | $\($_.text\)" } }; if \($_.abilities\) { $_.abilities | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  abl: $\($_.name\) | $\($_.text\)" } } })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\nafar\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\CardSearch\\pokeref"; $idx = Get-Content "public\\data\\index.json" -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Total index entries: $\($idx.Count\)"; $idx | Group-Object setIdJa | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\) cards" })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\nafar\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\CardSearch\\pokeref"; $bp = Get-Content "public\\data\\cards\\bp.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $bp | Where-Object { $_.id -in @\("bp-15","bp-17","bp-89","bp-90","bp-95","bp-97","bp-98","bp-99","bp-100"\) } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.id\): '$\($_.nameJa\)' dex=$\($_.nationalPokedexNumber\)" })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\nafar\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\CardSearch\\pokeref"; $idx = Get-Content "public\\data\\index.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $idx | Group-Object setIdJa | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\) cards" })

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.pokemontcg.io/v2/sets?pageSize=50" -UseBasicParsing; $resp.data | Where-Object { $_.releaseDate -ge "2024-10-01" } | Sort-Object releaseDate | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.id\) - $\($_.name\) - $\($_.total\) cards - $\($_.releaseDate\)" })

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.pokemontcg.io/v2/sets?pageSize=100&orderBy=-releaseDate" -UseBasicParsing; $resp.data | Select-Object -First 20 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.id\) - $\($_.name\) - $\($_.total\) cards - $\($_.releaseDate\)" })
